issues.detail: The skill file lacks explicit instructions for the AI on how to use the skill, making it ambiguous.
The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases, limiting robustness.

scenarios.name: presence-tracking-welcome
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric with Ably code, while Response B uses Laravel Echo/Pusher and misses all required Ably elements.

scenarios.name: batch-publish-serverless
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers the required POST to /messages with an array of messages but omits token generation, while Response B fails to use ably.request and also omits token generation.

scenarios.name: chat-room-typing-reactions
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A does not use the Chat SDK or required methods.
